titleZh: 《Folk on the Delaware General Corporation Law》
titleEn: Folk on the Delaware General Corporation Law
publisher: Google Books / Wolters Kluwer Law & Business
abstractZh: 围绕特拉华总公司法逐条展开，是进入美国公司法尤其是 Delaware 体系时最常被引用的实务型注释书之一。
abstractEn: A leading section-by-section guide to the Delaware General Corporation Law and one of the most frequently cited practice-oriented starting points for U.S. corporate law research.
